name: [GRIDHAND] Competitor Monitor Agent - Competitor gains 10+ reviews this month → benchmark alert

gridhand.scenario: Competitor gains 10+ reviews this month → benchmark alert
gridhand.description: When a competitor gains more than 10 new reviews in a month, a benchmark alert is triggered, sending a notification to the business owner via email and the GRIDHAND mobile app, prompting them to review their own reputation management strategy and respond to any recent reviews on platforms like Yelp or Google My Business. This alert workflow automatically summarizes the competitor's review trends and sentiment analysis, providing valuable insights to help the business owner adjust their marketing efforts and stay competitive in the market. By staying on top of competitor activity, the business owner can maintain a strong online presence and attract more customers to their store, ultimately driving sales and revenue growth.
